sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
Stable semantics and configurable language through Vocabulary model
Canonical artifact identities through Vocabulary rows
Project posture kernel and recommendation contracts

repo_truth: Live Rust still uses a fixed CanonicalArtifactKind/layout and Markdown-canonical authoring paths, with typed YAML input validation and deterministic renderers as useful precursors. Generic role/schema registries, kind/instance profiles, intake/promotion, vocabulary, and posture-kernel runtime contracts are not implemented. The complete HCM-0.2 documentation subject updates only control-pack documents 00, 01, 02, 03, 05, and 06; 04 is slice-boundary authority. Runtime program gates remain open and no Rust file changed.
allowed_scope: Read the exact authority sections and replay every entry in subject_manifest against the live repository.
Review the complete post-remediation HCM-0.2 semantic freeze and coupled proof/regression update read-only.
Run read-only YAML-example, link, terminology, field-matrix, archive, handoff-validator, changed-path, GitNexus, and whitespace checks.
non_goals: No Rust/runtime implementation, shipped default-set selection, HCM-0.3 Resolution/Snapshot freeze, CLI/Tauri/Substrate/dock work, or runtime proof-gate promotion.
No edits, commits, global handoff, ledger write, new dispatch, or user task hop by the reviewer.
Do not rely on parent implementation reasoning or treat examples as approved shipped defaults.
tasks: Independently verify HCM-0.2 authority and dependency boundaries from live files.
Check every in-scope authored/derived field for unambiguous owner/authority, default/omission, validation, fingerprint closure, and explicit non-goal.
Check exact stable-role registry, source-versus-resolved profile identity, capability dependency/cardinality, intake/promotion, and constitutional-root contracts.

Cross-link every repeated exact example ref: handbook.profile.example@1.0.0 must resolve one consistent instance ID, kind, schema closure, canonical path, intake, promotion target, posture source, and transition target without selecting shipped defaults.

Check posture trigger/policy/rule fingerprints, exact freshness/kernel inputs, one global-dimension recommendation plus causal scope metadata, policy notification conformance, constitutional-root-only transition, reassessment, and result replay.
Check fixed renderer-derived Markdown terminology remains separate from later Resolution-aware Projections across the subject.
Verify all examples parse and cross-link semantically, HCM-0.6 defaults remain unresolved, live precursors remain accurate, runtime gates remain open, and no sibling slice/Rust scope widened.
Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact remediation/verification. Return CLEAN only if no actionable finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: 05 HCM-0.2 frozen design contracts and per-field matrices
stop_conditions: Return blocked if required authority, subject files, or validation infrastructure are unavailable.
Return a Required finding rather than choosing any shipped default or widening into HCM-0.3+.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
